dashboard.siteSubtitle: All applications, statistics and smart tools in one place.

applications.title: Job Applications
applications.insight: Import applications from CSV or TXT and save time.
applications.description: All your applications in one place. Add, import, update statuses and stay organized throughout the process.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Overview of your job search results. See how many applications you've sent, where you get responses and how long the process actually takes.

ai.title: JobTrack Ai
ai.insight: Your assistant in the job search
ai.description: Your AI assistant for job hunting. Ask questions about your applications, prepare cover letters, improve your CV and plan next steps.
